title: Layout and Density
description: Spacing, borders, columns, and overall compactness

items.label: Background Pattern
items.description: A subtle pattern behind the app background.

items.label: Border Radius
items.description: Corner roundness for cards and buttons app-wide.

items.label: Budget Table Row Height
items.description: Adjust how tall each budget table row is.

items.label: Dark Report Cards
items.description: Use a darker background for widget cards on the Reports page.

items.label: Hide Month Selection On Scroll
items.description: Collapse the month navigation row while scrolling the budget table.

items.label: Toggle Column Visibility
items.description: Show or hide individual transaction table columns.

items.label: Resizable Transaction Columns
items.description: Drag column edges to resize the transaction table.

items.label: Sidebar Account Spacing
items.description: Adjust the spacing between accounts in the sidebar.

items.label: Alternating Transaction Row Colors
items.description: Zebra-stripe the transaction table for easier scanning.

items.label: Budget Card Styling
items.description: Add a spending flow bar to the current month's budget card.

items.label: Category Progress Indicators
items.description: A progress ring next to each budget balance — hover for spending details.

items.label: Color Negative Account Balances
items.description: Highlight negative account balances in red.

items.label: Color Transactions
items.description: Color upcoming scheduled transaction rows.

items.label: Dim Reconciled Transactions
items.description: Fade reconciled rows in the transaction table.

items.label: Improve Notification Contrast
items.description: Darker text on notification banners for readability.

items.label: Show Daily Available
items.description: Show a daily spending allowance under To Budget.

items.label: Highlight Uncategorized Transactions
items.description: Flag transactions that are missing a category.

items.label: Tag Styling
items.description: Color #tags in notes and transaction fields.

items.label: Header Border
items.description: Add a border under the top navigation bar.

items.label: Report Card Borders
items.description: Add borders around widget cards on the Reports page.

items.label: Budget Page Borders
items.description: Add borders around sections of the budget table.

items.label: Budget Totals Label Styling
items.description: Mute and uppercase the Budgeted/Spent/Balance labels.

items.label: Improved Sidebar Design
items.description: A cleaner layout for the account sidebar.

items.label: Modern Sidebar Icons
items.description: Replaces the nav icons with a matching, modern set.

items.label: Sidebar Search Bar
items.description: Quickly filter accounts, categories, and pages.

items.label: Sidebar Shortcuts
items.description: Pin quick links and tools to the sidebar.

items.label: Account Icon Picker
items.description: Set a custom favicon or emoji icon per account.

items.label: Category Color Dots
items.description: Show a colored dot for each transaction's category.

items.label: Category Emoji Picker
items.description: Set a custom emoji icon for each category.

items.label: Category Template Insights
items.description: Progress bars showing how funded each category's #template is.

items.label: Template Plan
items.description: Side panel breakdown after applying or overwriting budget templates.

items.label: Spending Calendar
items.description: A calendar view of daily spending, added to the sidebar.
